hub.title: aitorevi.tools — mini tools that run in your browser
hub.description: A collection of free web mini-tools that run 100% in your browser, with no sign-up and without uploading files to any server.
hub.ogTitle: aitorevi.tools — tools that run in your browser
hub.ogDescription: Free web mini-tools that run 100% in your browser: no sign-up and no uploading files to any server.
hub.jsonldDescription: Web mini-tools that run 100% in the browser, with no server and no uploads.
hub.subtitle: Free web mini-utilities that run entirely in your browser. No sign-up, no server, and your files never leave your device.

soonCard.name: More tools
soonCard.desc: I'm preparing new mini-utilities focused on privacy and speed. Check back soon.

licenses.title: Licenses — aitorevi.tools
licenses.description: Third-party libraries and fonts used in aitorevi.tools, with their licenses (MIT and SIL Open Font License).
licenses.ogDescription: Third-party software and fonts used in aitorevi.tools and their licenses.
licenses.subtitle: aitorevi.tools uses these open-source libraries and fonts, with their copyright notices and licenses.
licenses.disclaimer: aitorevi.tools is provided as is, without warranty. Your files are processed entirely in your browser and are never sent to any server.

meta.title: Split PDF — split a PDF into single pages, free and in your browser
meta.description: Split any PDF into individual pages right in your browser. Free, no sign-up and without uploading files to any server. Download individually or as a ZIP.
meta.ogTitle: Split PDF — split a PDF into single pages
meta.ogDescription: Split a PDF into individual pages in your browser. Free, no sign-up and no uploads. Download individually or as a ZIP.
meta.jsonldDescription: Split a PDF into individual pages in the browser. Download individually or as a ZIP, without uploading files to any server.

card.name: Split PDF
card.desc: Split any PDF into single pages and download them one by one or all together in a ZIP.

meta.title: Merge PDF — combine several PDFs into one, free and in your browser
meta.description: Merge several PDFs into a single document right in your browser. Reorder them as you like. Free, no sign-up and without uploading anything to any server.
meta.ogTitle: Merge PDF — combine several PDFs into one
meta.ogDescription: Merge several PDFs into a single document in your browser. Reorder them as you like. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Combine several PDFs into a single document in the browser, reorderable, without uploading files to any server.

card.name: Merge PDF
card.desc: Combine several PDFs into a single document. Reorder them as you like before downloading.

meta.title: Image to PDF — convert JPG and PNG to PDF, free and in your browser
meta.description: Convert your JPG or PNG images into a PDF right in your browser. Reorder them as you like. Free, no sign-up and without uploading anything to any server.
meta.ogTitle: Image to PDF — convert JPG and PNG to PDF
meta.ogDescription: Convert JPG or PNG images into a PDF in your browser. Reorder them as you like. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Convert JPG or PNG images into a PDF in the browser, reorderable, without uploading files to any server.

card.name: Image to PDF
card.desc: Convert your JPG or PNG images into a PDF. Reorder them before downloading.

meta.title: PDF watermark — add a text watermark to your PDF, free and in your browser
meta.description: Add a diagonal text watermark to every page of a PDF, in your browser. Free, no sign-up and without uploading the file to any server.
meta.ogTitle: PDF watermark — add text to your PDF
meta.ogDescription: Add a text watermark to every page of a PDF, in your browser. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Add a text watermark to every page of a PDF, in the browser, without uploading the file to any server.

card.name: PDF watermark
card.desc: Add diagonal text to every page of a PDF, with adjustable opacity and size.

meta.title: Multiple pages per sheet (n-up) in PDF — free and in your browser
meta.description: Place 2, 4, 6 or 9 pages from one or more PDFs on each A4 sheet for printing, in your browser. Free, no sign-up and without uploading anything to any server.
meta.ogTitle: Multiple pages per sheet (n-up) in PDF
meta.ogDescription: Place 2, 4, 6 or 9 pages from one or more PDFs per A4 sheet for printing, in your browser. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldName: Multiple pages per sheet (n-up) in PDF
meta.jsonldDescription: Combine one or more PDFs and place 2, 4, 6 or 9 pages on each A4 sheet for printing, in the browser, without uploading the files to any server.

card.name: Pages per sheet
card.desc: Place 2, 4, 6 or 9 pages from one or more PDFs on each A4 sheet to print and save paper.

meta.title: Compress image — reduce the size of JPG, PNG and WebP, free and in your browser
meta.description: Compress JPG, PNG or WebP images to make them smaller, right in your browser. Adjust quality and size. Free, no sign-up and without uploading anything to any server.
meta.ogTitle: Compress image — reduce the size of JPG, PNG and WebP
meta.ogDescription: Compress images in your browser by adjusting quality and size. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Compress JPG, PNG or WebP images in the browser by adjusting quality and size, without uploading the image to any server.

card.name: Compress image
card.desc: Reduce the size of your images by adjusting quality and size, without them leaving your browser.

meta.title: Convert image — PNG, JPG and WebP, free and in your browser
meta.description: Convert images between PNG, JPG and WebP right in your browser. Free, no sign-up and without uploading the image to any server.
meta.ogTitle: Convert image — PNG, JPG and WebP
meta.ogDescription: Convert images between PNG, JPG and WebP in your browser. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Convert images between PNG, JPG and WebP in the browser, without uploading the image to any server.

card.name: Convert image
card.desc: Convert between PNG, JPG and WebP, choosing the output format and quality.

meta.title: Remove image metadata (EXIF/GPS) — free and in your browser
meta.description: Remove EXIF metadata, GPS location and camera data from your JPG or PNG photos, without losing quality and in your browser. Free and without uploading the image to any server.
meta.ogDescription: Remove EXIF, GPS location and camera data from your photos, without losing quality and in your browser. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Remove EXIF, GPS and camera metadata from JPG or PNG photos without re-compressing, in the browser, without uploading the image to any server.

card.name: Remove metadata
card.desc: Remove EXIF, GPS location and camera data from your photos, without losing quality.
